summary: Verified the signup bug fix (Bearer token in body + localStorage) and full regression. 28/28 backend pytest pass (added 6 new tests: register/login access_token in body, Bearer-only /auth/me without cookies, invalid Bearer, manifest.json, sw.js). Frontend E2E all pass: signup redirects to /dashboard without auth-error and lotto_token (len 227) is stored; page reload keeps session on /dashboard; logout clears token and post-logout reload redirects to /auth. Admin login (admin@lottopredict.app/admin123) reaches dashboard. Dashboard renders game toggle (lotto/euromillions), hot/cold/overdue cards, frequency chart, 52 real historical draws for both games. Statistical predict returns 3 sets, save persists, /saved lists items, delete removes them. Mobile 390x844: landing/auth/dashboard have 0px horizontal overflow, nav is compact (icons) and usable.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py set_auth_cookies still uses secure=False and samesite='lax'. On the deployed https preview this means cookies work, but for cross-site mobile webviews samesite='none' + secure=True would be required. The Bearer-in-body fallback now covers that gap, so functionally fine.

AuthContext.jsx does not attempt a silent refresh on 401 - once the 12h access token expires the user is logged out. Consider using the existing refresh_token cookie to auto-refresh (backend already issues one via set_auth_cookies, but no /auth/refresh endpoint is exposed).

PWA sw.js is present but nothing in index.html registers it (no navigator.serviceWorker.register). The manifest is linked, so 'Add to Home screen' works, but offline caching will never activate. Non-blocking for MVP.
backend/tests/backend_test.py still hard-codes a default BASE_URL fallback; per env-var policy it should raise if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is unset (carried over from prev iteration).

api.js interceptor sends Authorization on every request including /auth/login and /auth/register. Harmless (backend ignores unused tokens for these routes) but slightly noisy - could guard with a URL check.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestAuth: test_register_returns_access_token, test_login_returns_access_token, test_bearer_only_me_no_cookies, test_bearer_invalid_token; added TestPWA: test_manifest_json, test_service_worker)
test_credentials: admin@lottopredict.app / admin123 confirmed working. Fresh signup emails generated per run (e2e_signup_<uuid>@example.com).
seed_data_creation: Each run registers ~3 disposable users via /api/auth/register and creates 1 saved prediction that is deleted at end of flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml (28 tests, ~5s). Bearer token localStorage key is 'lotto_token' (frontend/src/lib/api.js). PWA endpoints /manifest.json and /sw.js are served by frontend origin (same host as REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Service worker is NOT registered from index.html - flag if user asks for offline behaviour. All primary testids: auth-toggle-mode, auth-name-input, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit, auth-error, nav-dashboard, nav-saved, nav-logout, game-toggle-lotto/euromillions, predict-statistical/ai buttons (text selector works), prediction-set-<i>, save-prediction-<i>, saved-item-<id>, delete-saved-<id>.
rca of the issue: Original 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' was a transient backend import crash + cookie-only auth that failed silently in some mobile webviews. Fix: (a) backend register/login now include access_token in JSON body, (b) get_current_user falls back to Authorization: Bearer header, (c) frontend stores token in localStorage under 'lotto_token' and axios interceptor attaches it to every request, (d) AuthContext checks token on mount and clears on 401 / logout. Verified end-to-end: signup succeeds, reload persists session, logout clears session, PWA manifest/sw served.
